query.description: Required. Entity type key. Allowed: lead, contact, company, property, vendor_company, project, tenant_user, email, phone, address, assignment, contact_assignment, file, file_folder, email_template, document_template
Required. Entity primary key (ULID, max 64 chars)
Boolean. When true (default), includes events where entity appears as a related entity, not just as the subject
Filter by event type. Operators: eq (default), ne, in, not_in, contains, starts_with, ends_with, does_not_contain. Example: property.updated
Filter by actor ID (ULID). Operators: eq (default), ne, in, not_in, contains, starts_with, ends_with, does_not_contain
Filter by origin. Values: api, system, job. Operators: eq (default), ne, in, not_in, contains, starts_with, ends_with, does_not_contain
Filter by request correlation ID (e.g., req_01jm...). Operators: eq (default), ne, in, not_in, contains, starts_with, ends_with, does_not_contain
Filter by workflow run ID (ULID). Operators: eq (default), ne, in, not_in, contains, starts_with, ends_with, does_not_contain
Date filter. Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, between (expects array of two ISO dates). Example: gte:2026-03-01T00:00:00Z
Free-text search across: event_type, subject_label, actor_label, related_label
Comma-separated signed fields (+ asc, - desc). Default: -occurred_at,-id

request.description:
List activity events for a specific entity, with optional filtering, search, and pagination.

**Auth:** requires authenticated tenant session/token (`auth:tenant-api`) and `activity` module view permission. Additionally, the viewer must have `view` permission on the subject entity.

**Required query params:**
- `filter[subject_type]`: one of the configured entity type keys
- `filter[subject_id]`: ULID of the target record

**Optional query params:**
- `filter[include_related]`: boolean (default true) — include events where entity is a related entity
- `filter[event_type]`, `filter[actor_id]`, `filter[origin]`, `filter[request_id]`, `filter[workflow_run_id]`: string filters
- `filter[occurred_at]`: date filter with operators
- `q`: free-text search
- `sort`: signed sort fields
- `page`, `per_page`: pagination

**String filter operators:** eq, ne, in, not_in/nin, contains, starts_with, ends_with, does_not_contain

**Date filter operators:** eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, between

**Default sort:** `-occurred_at,-id`

**Authorization notes:**
- Module-level: viewer must have `activity` module view permission
- Subject-level: viewer must have `view` permission on the subject entity
- For commons entities (email, phone, address, file, assignment, contact_assignment), authorization is checked against the parent entity

**Event types follow pattern:** `{module}.{action}` (e.g., `property.created`, `contact.updated`, `email.deleted`, `email_template.cloned`)

**include parameter:** Prohibited — relations are always loaded.

**Example:**
- `?filter[subject_type]=property&filter[subject_id]=<ulid>&filter[event_type]=property.updated&sort=-occurred_at&page=1&per_page=25`

response.name: 200 Activity Events (Paginated)
422 Validation Error (Missing required filters)
